IntroductionGetting StartedDesign TokensStarters
Components
All ComponentsApp ShellSidebar & TreeToolbarCanvas & PreviewAddon PanelControlsDocs PanelStatus BarStory Card

Toolbar

Horizontal strip of tool buttons above the canvas. Groups separated by dividers, with a spacer to push secondary tools right.

Full Toolbar

<div class="cf-toolbar">
  <div class="cf-toolbar-group">
    <button class="cf-tool is-active" type="button"><i class="bi bi-window"></i>Canvas</button>
    <button class="cf-tool" type="button"><i class="bi bi-file-text"></i>Docs</button>
  </div>
  <div class="cf-toolbar-group">
    <button class="cf-tool" type="button"><i class="bi bi-sliders"></i>Controls</button>
    <button class="cf-tool" type="button"><i class="bi bi-activity"></i>Actions</button>
  </div>
  <span class="cf-toolbar-spacer"></span>
  <div class="cf-toolbar-group">
    <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary cf-icon-button"
            type="button" aria-label="Fullscreen">
      <i class="bi bi-arrows-fullscreen"></i>
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

Tool States

<!-- Default -->
<button class="cf-tool" type="button">Canvas</button>

<!-- Active / selected -->
<button class="cf-tool is-active" type="button">Canvas</button>

<!-- With keyboard shortcut badge -->
<button class="cf-tool" type="button">
  Fullscreen <kbd class="cf-shortcut">F</kbd>
</button>

Icon-only Tools

Use .cf-icon-button on Bootstrap's .btn for square icon-only buttons that sit alongside .cf-tool.

Viewport Selector Pattern

Common Storybook pattern — buttons in a group that set the canvas iframe width.

Classes

ClassElementDescription
.cf-toolbardivFlex row bar. Add to the top of .cf-center.
.cf-toolbar-groupdivFlex group of tools. Adjacent groups get an auto-separator divider line.
.cf-toolbar-spacerspanFlex-grow element that pushes subsequent groups to the right edge.
.cf-toolbuttonPill-shaped tool button. Add .is-active for selected state.
.cf-shortcutkbdSmall keyboard shortcut badge styled for toolbar use.
.cf-icon-buttonbutton2rem × 2rem square icon-only button. Combine with .btn.btn-sm.btn-outline-secondary.
Docs ready Components FantasyUI
